filePurposes.polyfills.js: ES6 polyfills: Promise (resolve/reject/then/catch/all), Array.from, Object.assign, atob, btoa. Sets __POLYFILLS_READY__.
filePurposes.scheduler.js: Async task scheduler with priority queue: concurrency=3, timeout=5s, maxRetries=2. Exposes __SCHEDULER__ with enqueue/getStats/cancelAll.
filePurposes.fprint/device.js: Device fingerprint collector (priority 10): navigator (UA/platform/language/concurrency/memory/vendor/plugins), screen (w/h/colorDepth), timezone (Intl), touch. Registers as 'device_v2'.
filePurposes.fprint/canvas.js: Canvas 2D + WebGL collector (priority 8): 2D text+shapes → DJB2 hash of imageData; WebGL GPU vendor/renderer via debug extension → DJB2 hash. Registers as 'canvas_v2'.
filePurposes.fprint/audio.js: AudioContext collector (priority 5): OscillatorNode (triangle 440Hz + sawtooth 220Hz) → DynamicsCompressor (-50/40/12) → AnalyserNode (fftSize=256) → 30-bin hex hash. Registers as 'audio_v2'.
filePurposes.encoder.js: Data encoder: strips metadata → JSON.stringify → btoa → XOR per char (key=0xA3). Caches in __FINGERPRINT_CACHE__. Exposes __ENCODER__ {encode, cacheResult, getCache}.
filePurposes.reporter.js: ENTRY POINT __reportRisk__: iterates __COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__ → scheduler.enqueue() all collectors → Promise.all → encoder.encode() → HMAC sign (key=integrity_v2_2025) → XHR POST with X-Risk-Signature header → beacon fallback. Also __queueEvent__ for batched events (10/batch, max 100).

dependencies.mechanism: btoa for base64 encoding in encoder

dataFlow: polyfills (Promise/atob/btoa) → scheduler (__SCHEDULER__ with concurrency=3) → 3 collectors register on __COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__ (device priority=10, canvas=8, audio=5) → encoder (__ENCODER__) → __reportRisk__(): scheduler.enqueue dispatches all collectors concurrently → Promise.all aggregates → encoder.encode (JSON→btoa→XOR 0xA3) → cacheResult → build packet {version:'2.0', client_ts, data, session_id} → HMAC sign (key: integrity_v2_2025) → XHR POST to https://risk.example.com/api/v2/collect (X-Risk-Signature header, 10s timeout) → on failure: sendBeacon fallback → auto-flush at 10 buffered events

endpoints.purpose: Submit fingerprint data with HMAC signature via XHR, beacon fallback
